subject: Quick thought on ALPHA60 Flinders Lane's website
body:
Hi there,

I came across ALPHA60 Flinders Lane while looking at Clothing store in Melbourne and really like what you're doing.

I noticed your website might have accessibility issues (79/100) — not a criticism, just something I spotted as a web designer.

I run a small design studio (kspf.au) and work with independent Melbourne businesses on exactly this kind of thing. Would you be open to a quick chat about it? No pressure, happy to share some thoughts either way.

Cheers,
Rowan
KSPF Design Studio
kspf.au

lead.name: ALPHA60 Flinders Lane
lead.issues: accessibility issues (79/100); slow loading (39/100 performance); technical issues (45/100 best practices)
